zh.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Praers於1338年出生在英國英格蘭爾巴堂姆利時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Praers51歲，母親Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley21歲。她於1354年之前與Sir Robert De Fouleshurst在英國爾奧維 奧福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1388年在英國爾南特維其享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Praers于1338年出生在英国英格兰爾巴堂姆利时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Praers51岁，母亲Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley21岁。她于1354年之前与Sir Robert De Fouleshurst在英国爾奧維 奧福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1388年在英国爾南特維其享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Praers was born in 1338, in Barthomley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas de Praers, was 51 and her mother, Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley, was 21. She married Sir Robert De Fouleshurst before 1354, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1388, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Praers est née en 1338, à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Praers, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert De Fouleshurst avant 1354, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1388, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Praers 1338 in Barthomley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Praers 51 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley 21. Sie hat vor 1354 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England Sir Robert De Fouleshurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1388 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Nantwich, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Praers è nata il nel 1338 nel Barthomley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Praers, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert De Fouleshurst prima del 1354, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1388, nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Praersが1338年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Praersは51歳，母Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomleyは21歳であった。1354年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーでSir Robert De Fouleshurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1388年にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Praers(이)가 1338년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 바톰리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Praers(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1354년 이전 영국 체실르 버 p오버에서 Sir Robert De Fouleshurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1388년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Praers nasceu em 1338, em Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Praers, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert De Fouleshurst antes 1354, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1388, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Praers родилась в 1338 г. в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Praers было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert De Fouleshurst перед 1354 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1388 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Praers nació en 1338, en Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Praers, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Robert De Fouleshurst antes de 1354, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1388, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
